# BloodstockAI

> AI-powered thoroughbred analysis platform for breeders, agents and owners — pedigree research, matings, broodmare plans, auction catalogue intelligence and breeze-up video analysis.

BloodstockAI brings institutional-grade research to every thoroughbred professional. Upload a single lot or a full auction catalogue and get pedigree, performance, conformation and market-pricing analysis in minutes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and platform highlights.
- [About](/about): Story, team and how the platform works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter and Professional plans, features and limits.
- [Reports](/reports): Published auction catalogue analyses and market reports.
- [Market Update](/market-update): AI-powered analysis of recent auction results and trends.
- [Ebook](/ebook): "AI Models Behind Winning Racehorses" — digital ebook.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for bespoke analysis or enterprise enquiries.
